args.message:
feat(bd): add Phase 1 solution brief for CSO 56000026SC001 AI Workspace

Recro + Pryon team response to IC OAI AI Workspace AOI.
Covers all 5 Phase 1 required sections:
- Commercial product ID and maturity (Pryon platform)
- Update/innovation model (Recro SAP pipeline for classified parity)
- Core capabilities mapping matrix vs. all desired attributes
- Integration architecture (C2E, OIDC, MCP Remote/OAuth, ATO strategy)
- ROM cost estimate ($2.8M-$3.9M) and 16-month schedule

Recro positioned as lead integration partner with TS FCL,
IC delivery track record (Grimlock, Phoenix, ECST), and
pre-existing Pryon partnership as primary differentiators.
